title: Hotbar connection glass
description: This pack changes the hotbar into a connected transparent glass design, giving Minecraft a clean, modern, and minimalist interface style.
body:
This resource pack transforms the Minecraft hotbar into a seamless connected glass design. Instead of separated slots, each box is linked together through a transparent glass effect, creating a clean and modern appearance. Items inside the hotbar stand out more clearly against the sleek glass background, giving a refined and stylish look. The connected glass bar makes the interface feel smoother and more unified, while still maintaining full visibility of selected items. Perfect for players who enjoy a minimalist and modern style, this pack enhances the visual experience of Minecraft without altering the original gameplay.
